title: Da Gamaskop Police request assistance
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Da Gamaskop Police require information about a severely injured man found in Marlin Street, Mossel Bay, in the early hours of 26 September last year.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police require information about a severely injured man found in Marlin Street, Mossel Bay, in the early hours of 26 September last year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The man, whose identity remains unknown, was transported to Mossel Bay Hospital and then George Hospital, where he died on 30 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police ask the public’s assistance to identify the man, as well as for any information on what might have happened to him on 26 September.","html":"The police ask the public’s assistance to identify the man, as well as for any information on what might have happened to him on 26 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man is believed to be in his early 30s, was of a dark complexion, had a medium build and was 1.67m tall.","html":"The man is believed to be in his early 30s, was of a dark complexion, had a medium build and was 1.67m tall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He had short, close-cropped black hair and a scar on his forehead. He had no tattoos or piercings.","html":"He had short, close-cropped black hair and a scar on his forehead. He had no tattoos or piercings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Should you know who this man is, or know about a certain commotion that took place between 03:00 and 06:00 on 26 September, call the investigating officer, Constable Jan-Hendrik Els, on 044 606 2238.","html":"Should you know who this man is, or know about a certain commotion that took place between 03:00 and 06:00 on 26 September, call the investigating officer, Constable Jan-Hendrik Els, on 044 606 2238."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
